name: tse-jira-ticket-creation
description: TSE-focused Jira ticket creation for Redis Technical Support Engineers. Creates Bug Jiras from Zendesk PDFs, multi-cluster RCA Jiras from Zendesk+Jira PDFs, and computes impact scores using the 8-130 model. Dry-run by default. Multi-project (RED/MOD/DOC/RDSC/RCA), sprint-blank, uses the claude.ai Atlassian MCP.
